data.body: STACK LANDED: all 5 changes MERGED. Gerrit main tip = faa40e7b07 = change 757 merged SHA (Gerrit Rebase-If-Necessary rebased my stack over the concurrently-landed identity-rollout change 8bb261c19). GitHub origin/main mirror still at 8bb261c19 = async replication lag (will catch up). Changes objectively on the authoritative Gerrit main. Now closing epic 81e2 (verifier reads local worktree tree which has all changes; will close UNSIGNED because 955c is force-closed => certifiable:false soft path, per design).
